creator: dab@rj45.org
text: Provides version 3.2.0rc1 of CherryPy, a pythonic web/HTTP framework. This was re-named to 3.2.0.r1 to comply with FreeBSD's package naming conventions. 3.2.0rc1 has been out for some time (October 2009) with no immediate forward progress towards a stable 3.2.0 release. A few other ports (news/sabnzbdplus in particular) require this newer version to facilitate updates to their own ports.
